ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- {message: "Bad request"}
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- {message: "Resource not found"}
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- {message: "Method not allowed"}
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- {message: "Not acceptable"}
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- {message: "Unsupported media type"}
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- {message: "Not Implemented"}
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- {message: "Resource not found"}

set-variable.value: #[attributes.uriParams.accountNumber as String]
#[%dw 2.0 output application/json var inp = [] --- inp<<payload reduce ((item, accumulator) -> item)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "message": "Account doesn't exist please try with correct account number", "accountNumber": vars.accountNumber }

parse-template.doc:name: Parse Template
parse-template.content: #[vars.emailBody]

set-variable.value: #[attributes.uriParams.accountNumber as String]

when.expression: #[sizeOf(payload) == 1 and payload.FULLNAME[0] == vars.inputpayload.FullName and payload.MOBILENUMBER[0] == vars.inputpayload.mobileNumber and payload.ADDRESS[0] == vars.inputpayload.address]

snowflake:update.doc:name: Update requested data
snowflake:update.snowflake:sql: UPDATE bank_customer_data SET FULLNAME =:FullName, ADDRESS =:address, MOBILENUMBER =:mobileNumber WHERE ACCOUNTNUMBER =:accountNumber
snowflake:update.snowflake:input-parameters: #[%dw 2.0 output application/java --- { FullName: vars.inputpayload.FullName, address: vars.inputpayload.address, mobileNumber: vars.inputpayload.mobileNumber, accountNumber: vars.accountNumber }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload

parse-template.doc:name: Parse Template
parse-template.content: #[vars.emailBody]

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var inp = [] --- inp<<payload reduce ((item, accumulator) -> item)]

parse-template.doc:name: Parse Template
parse-template.content: #[vars.emailBody]

parse-template.doc:name: Parse Template
parse-template.content: #[vars.emailBody]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload

snowflake:select.doc:name: retrive transaction data
snowflake:select.snowflake:sql:
SELECT c.ACCOUNTNUMBER AS accountNumber,
t.value['transactionType']::string AS transactionType,
t.value['amount']::number AS amount,
t.value['balance']::number AS balance,
t.value['timestamp']::string AS timestamp
FROM MYDATABASE.PUBLIC.BANK_CUSTOMER_DATA c, LATERAL FLATTEN(input => c.TRANSACTIONS) t
WHERE c.ACCOUNTNUMBER = :accountNumber;

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload map ((row) -> { accountNumber: row.ACCOUNTNUMBER, transactionType: row.TRANSACTIONTYPE, amount: row.AMOUNT, balance: row.BALANCE, timestamp: row.TIMESTAMP })
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "Failed", message: "We couldn’t find an account with the given account number. Please check and try again.", accountNumber: vars.accountNumber }

parse-template.doc:name: Parse Template
parse-template.content: #[vars.emailBody]

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { adharNumber: attributes.queryParams.adharNumber, bankName: attributes.queryParams.bankName }]
#[%dw 2.0 output application/json var inp = [] --- inp<<payload reduce ((item, accumulator) -> item)]

when.expression: #[vars.inputPayload.address == null or vars.inputPayload.mobileNumber == null or vars.inputPayload.FullName == null or vars.inputPayload.dateOfBirth == null or vars.inputPayload.email == null]

snowflake:select.doc:name: verify account
snowflake:select.snowflake:sql: SELECT ACCOUNTNUMBER FROM bank_customer_data WHERE email = :email OR dateOfBirth = :dateOfBirth OR adharNumber = :adharNumber;

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload[0]

logger.doc:name: The customer account is already existed in DB
logger.message: ----------------------------The customer account is already existed in DB--------------------------#[payload]

snowflake:insert.doc:name: Insert data
snowflake:insert.snowflake:input-parameters: #[{ "FullName": vars.inputPayload.FullName, "dateOfBirth": vars.inputPayload.dateOfBirth, "mobileNumber": vars.inputPayload.mobileNumber, "email": vars.inputPayload.email, "address": vars.inputPayload.address, "adharNumber": vars.inputAttributes.adharNumber, "accountNumber": vars.accountNumber, "bankName": vars.inputAttributes.bankName }]

parse-template.doc:name: Parse Template
parse-template.content: #[vars.emailBody]

set-variable.value: #[payload[0].BALANCE default 0]

parse-template.doc:name: Parse Template
parse-template.content:
Welcome to #[vars.BANKNAME]

#[vars.emailBody]

Note: This is an automated email. Please do not reply to this email.

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "Amount deposited successfully done for the Account Number - " ++ vars.accountNumber, 'type': 'Deposit', timestamp: now(), balance: vars.balance default 0 }

set-variable.value: #[(payload.amount default 0) as Number]
#[%dw 2.0 output application/json var inp = [] --- inp<<payload reduce ((item, accumulator) -> item)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "Account is identified but Amount deposited failed for Account Number - " ++ vars.inputpayload.ACCOUNTNUMBER[0] as String }

%dw 2.0 output application/json var accNo = vars.inputpayload.ACCOUNTNUMBER[0] as String var bank = vars.inputpayload.BANKNAME[0] as String --- { errorCode: "ACCOUNT_NOT_FOUND", message: "Your account number " ++ accNo ++ " does not exist in bank " ++ bank ++ ". Please try with a different account number." }

set-variable.value: #[payload[0].BALANCE default 0]

#[%dw 2.0 output text/plain var acc = vars.accountNumber var record = (payload filter ($.ACCOUNTNUMBER == acc))[0] default {} --- "

Debit Transaction Alert

Dear Customer,

Your withdrawal transaction has been processed successfully.

Amount: ₹" ++ ((vars.amount default 0) as String) ++ "

Account Number: " ++ (vars.accountNumber as String) ++ "

Available Balance: ₹" ++ ((record.BALANCE default 0) as String) ++ "

"]

parse-template.doc:name: Parse Template
parse-template.content:
Welcome to #[vars.BANKNAME]

#[vars.emailBody]

Note: This is an automated email. Please do not reply to this email.

email:send.doc:name: Email Send deposit amount
email:send.subject: #["Amount Withdraw is successful Today! " ++ vars.BANKNAME as String]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json var acc = (vars.accountNumber as String) --- { amount: vars.amount, status: "Amount debited successfully done for Account Number - " ++ vars.accountNumber as String, time: now(), 'type': 'Withdraw', balance: vars.balance default 0 }

set-variable.value: #[(payload.amount default 0) as Number]
set-variable.doc:name: Set amount

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var inp = [] --- inp<<payload reduce ((item, accumulator) -> item)]

snowflake:update.snowflake:input-parameters: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { amount: vars.amount, accountNumber: vars.accountNumber }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { amount: vars.amount, timestamp: payload.CREATED_AT as String default "", status: "Account is identified but Amount withdraw failed for Account Number - " ++ vars.inputpayload.ACCOUNTNUMBER[0] as String }

%dw 2.0 output application/json var accNo = vars.inputpayload.ACCOUNTNUMBER[0] as String var bank = vars.inputpayload.BANKNAME[0] as String --- { errorCode: "ACCOUNT_NOT_FOUND", message: "Your account number " ++ accNo ++ " does not exist in bank " ++ bank ++ ". Please try with a different account number." }
